## Load noise parameters {.unnumbered}


### Description

Load noise parameters



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>as_noise_params(data, antigen_isos = NULL)
</code></pre>


### Arguments

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
a <code>data.frame()</code> or tibble::tbl_df
</td></tr>
<tr><td style = "white-space: collapse; font-family: monospace; vertical-align: top"><code id="antigen_isos">antigen_isos</code></td>
<td>
<code>character()</code> vector of antigen isotypes
to be used in analyses
</td></tr>
</table>


### Value

a <code>noise_params</code> object (a tibble::tbl_df with
extra attribute <code>antigen_isos</code>)



### Examples
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
library("serocalculator")

library(magrittr)
noise_data <-
  serocalculator_example("example_noise_params.csv") %>%
  read.csv() %>%
  as_noise_params()

print(noise_data)



```
